summary: True Joy Birthing Midwifery Services Agreement Contract System - Backend API testing completed. All 25 tests pass (100%). Complete contract workflow verified: template retrieval (12 sections), contract creation with payment details, listing contracts, sending with midwife signature, client signing (public endpoint), public contract view, and HTML generation.
seed_data_creation: Created test Midwife user with client for contract testing (new unique users created per test run)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Midwife contract system fully tested. All 12 sections verified (Scope of Midwifery Services, Client Responsibilities, Birth Setting & Transfer of Care, On-Call Period & Backup Care, Fees & Payment Terms, Termination of Care & Refunds, Risks & Informed Consent, Scope Limitations, Confidentiality & Records, Communication & Emergencies, Liability & Legal Acknowledgment, Acknowledgement). Test account test_midwife_contract@test.com / password123 exists with one contract already created.

features_tested.GET /api/midwife/contract-template: PASS - Returns full Midwifery Services Agreement template with all 12 sections
features_tested.POST /api/midwife/contracts: PASS - Creates contract with client_name, partner_name, due_date, birth_place, on-call weeks, payment details, all template sections
features_tested.GET /api/midwife/contracts: PASS - Returns list of all midwife's contracts
features_tested.GET /api/midwife/contracts/{id}: PASS - Returns specific contract with all details (authenticated)
features_tested.POST /api/midwife/contracts/{id}/send: PASS - Sends contract, creates midwife_signature, updates client status to 'Contract Sent'
features_tested.POST /api/midwife-contracts/{id}/sign: PASS - Client signs contract (public endpoint), creates client_signature, updates status to 'Signed', updates client status to 'Contract Signed'
features_tested.GET /api/midwife-contracts/{id}: PASS - Returns public contract view with contract, client, and midwife info
features_tested.GET /api/midwife-contracts/{id}/html: PASS - Returns formatted HTML version with all 12 sections
features_tested.additional_terms_storage: PASS - Additional terms field stored and displayed in HTML
features_tested.client_status_updates: PASS - Client status correctly updated to 'Contract Sent' then 'Contract Signed'

signature_workflow_verified.midwife_signature: Created when contract is sent (status changes to 'Sent')
signature_workflow_verified.client_signature: Created when client signs via public endpoint (status changes to 'Signed')
signature_workflow_verified.validation: Cannot sign draft contract, cannot double sign, signer name required

api_endpoints_tested_summary: GET /api/midwife-contracts/{id} - Public, contract view for signing
